textPlain: Old school NES Jaws is really fun!  If you want a 1980s retro throwback you can play it online here, and a few other retro game websites:https://www.retrogames.cz/play_381-NES.phpWhen you get the minisub (appears randomly after 20 conch shells or I think 30,000 points) it is sooooo fun.
